description.unified: Restores HP equal to 10% of Max HP to the 4 allies with the lowest HP, and additionally restores HP every [1sec for 10sec->0.5 sec for 5 sec]. This effect cannot be dispelled.
Removes harmful effects from all allies and increases their Magic Defense by 50(1+0.3Skill Level) for [15sec->6 sec].
Deals Magic Damage to enemies within range 10 time(s), and reduces their Attack Speed by [10%->25%] for 10 sec.
Every [8sec->7 sec], restores 1000 Mana and HP to 1 ally with the lowest HP.

IV.unified: Increases Mana Recovery per sec of the target by [15%->50%].
Increases CC Resist by [120 for 15 sec->300 for 6 sec].

dark.unified: Magic Defense is additionally increased by [10%->13%].

light.unified: Magic Damage taken by the target is increased by [10%->25%].

dark.unified: Physical Damage taken by the target is increased by [10%->25%].
On hit, has a 10% chance to reduce all of the target's Defense by 20% and reduce the cooldown of all your skills by 5%. [(removed) All allies’ Mana recovery per second increases by 30%.]

description.unified: Every 20 sec, puts the 2 allies with the lowest HP into Spirit Form for {0} sec. Allies in Spirit Form are immune to physical attacks, their HP cannot be reduced below 1%, and their Mana recovery per second is increased by [35%->50%].
